ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – Action Required
ham.body:
Hi Team,

This is a reminder that our corporate VPN will undergo scheduled maintenance on **Friday, April 19th, 2026 from 11:00 PM to 2:00 AM (ET)**. During this window the VPN service will be unavailable. Please plan your work accordingly.

**What you need to do**
1. Log out of all VPN sessions by 10:30 PM.
2. If you have any critical tasks that require VPN access, plan to complete them before the maintenance window.
3. After 2:00 AM, the VPN will be back online. If you encounter any issues, please contact the IT Help Desk at helpdesk@company.com or call 555‑123‑4567.

Thank you for your cooperation. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.

Best regards,

Alexandra Green
IT Operations Manager

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Team Meeting for Project X
spam.body:
Hello [Name],

I hope you are doing well. We need to hold an **urgent** meeting today at **3:00 PM EST** to discuss critical updates for Project X. Your presence is mandatory.

Please join the meeting using the link below:

<URL>

The meeting will cover:
- Final timeline adjustments
- Risk mitigation strategies
- Key deliverable approvals

If you cannot attend, please notify me immediately so we can reschedule.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Regards,

Jordan Mitchell
Project Lead
